sections.location: Located in each of the bedrooms as well as the hallways outside the bedrooms.
Located in attic closet upstairs across from the washer and dryer.
Located to the right of the attic closet upstairs.
The main water shut off is located in the grass near the mailbox. Look for the lid labeled "water meter"
The HVAC system is located beneath the house.
Located around the left side of the house on the siding.
We do not use cameras at this property.
Located in the downstairs hallway to the bedrooms.

tips.text:
Test smoke detectors at least once a month using the test button.

Change batteries when smoke detector beeps.
If a breaker trips, switch it fully OFF then back ON to reset.
Replace the filter every 60-90 days, or more often if you have pets.
